programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Money Mind
programme.desc: Can Singapore stocks deliver good returns, if you look beyond blue chips? Surviving in the gig economy when income can disappear overnight. How the dream of a cheap rural reset met financial reality.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: China is transforming deserts into green land. CNA Correspondent goes inside one of the world's largest desertification control projects - exploring the people, technology and decades of effort.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Japan Hour [English Subtitles]
programme.desc: From the port of Kobe, we cycle across the fall mountains to explore the inland side of Hyogo, an area where people treasure their unique cultural traditions as a legacy for generations to come.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: The New Locals S2
programme.desc: In Madrid, a new generation of Chinese locals is embracing Spanish life without letting go of its roots.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: We celebrate Singaporeans making a quiet impact despite challenges. Kelvin Pung, a disabled diver, captures marine life while Azman Hamid, one of Pulau Ubin's last taxi drivers, preserves kampung life.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: The Eukrainian
programme.desc: While her nation is fighting for its survival - her task is to give that survival a meaning when peace comes. Olha Stefanishyna is THE EUKRAINIAN - a young minister with the almost insurmountable task of bringing her country into the EU.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: China is transforming deserts into green land. CNA Correspondent goes inside one of the world's largest desertification control projects - exploring the people, technology and decades of effort.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: That new house smell. Is it making you sick? Possibly. There's been a surge in formaldehyde removal services. How much should you worry? And what can you do about it? Steven Chia finds out.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Zuckerberg: From Geek to Guru
programme.desc: The head of META wields as much power as a head of state. Between selling personal data, his closeness to Donald Trump, and his attraction to masculinism, the billionaire continues his march toward fascism. Who is Mark Zuckerberg really?

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: The New Locals S2
programme.desc: From El Raval, Filipinos in Barcelona are shaping the city through culture, creativity and community.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Reaching The Unreached S2
programme.desc: The Healthy Kazakhstan train is a 12-carriage mobile hospital that crosses 6,000 km yearly through Kazakhstan, bringing specialist healthcare to remote communities.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is shut - and Singaporeans are feeling it at the pump, at the checkout, and at the airport. Steven Chia traces the fuel crisis from the waterway to your wallet.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: ROOTS: A Greening Journey
programme.desc: Singapore horticulturists search for new climate proof trees in Latin America, where years ago, the city-state's greening pioneers sourced plants that helped transform the island into a Garden City.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Karikal Mahal: A Silent Witness
programme.desc: In 1941, Karikal Mahal became a prison for European civilians after Japan's invasion. Once luxurious, it turns into a harsh camp where internees face strict discipline before being moved to Changi.

programme.title: Insight 2026/2027
programme.desc: Business Process Outsourcing is one of the industries most likely to be disrupted by AI. India and Philippines have the world's largest BPO sectors. Will tech threaten the livelihoods of millions?

programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Chingay: Asia's Largest Street Performance
programme.desc: Singapore and Malaysia have jointly nominated the Chingay Parade for UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list. What does that mean for the annual spectacle held in Singapore, JB and George Town?

programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.desc: Business Process Outsourcing is one of the industries most likely to be disrupted by AI. India and Philippines have the world's largest BPO sectors. Will tech threaten the livelihoods of millions?

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: When Titans Clash S12: China And The Iran War
programme.desc: How is the Iran crisis impacting China's energy policies, its clean energy exports and nuclear power plans? With US approval ratings dropping globally, what does it mean for China-ASEAN, and China-Europe relations?
